facebook.caption:
Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss.

Dgold Spa runs body massage, foot massage, shampoo, and nail services under one roof. 5.0 stars across 52 reviews. That rating doesn't happen by accident.

After a full beach day, your feet will thank you for stopping here.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Feet wrecked from the beach. Walked into Dgold Spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Walked out a different person. Body massage, foot massage, nails. 5.0 stars. Go.
